name: Old Fashioned Apple-Blueberry Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Granny Smith apples, peeled, cored and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. In a quart saucepan, melt butter and cream over low heat, stirring occasionally, and set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine sugar and eggs. Beat with an electric mixer on medium speed, scraping the bowl often until well mixed.
4. Gradually add the butter mixture, flour, baking powder, and salt to the sugar and egg mixture. Continue beating, scraping the bowl often until smooth.
5. With your hands, gently stir in the apples and blueberries.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 13 x 9-inch (inches) baking pan.
7. Bake for 45-55 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Serve warm with sweetened whipping cream.
